{{Quote|This is almost at the edge of known space, about as ''far'' from the Empire as a body can get. Why'd we come all this way, Princess?|Chedaki, to Leia Organa|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
[[Captain]] '''Chedaki''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who commanded a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|blockade runner]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Chedaki carried Rebel leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] on board his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] on a mission to the remote [[Shiva system/Legends|Shiva system]], investigating a strange amount of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] interest in the obscure region. Upon arrival, Chedaki and Organa attempted to do short-range scans of the inhabited [[Shiva IV]] in the blockade runner's [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], only for their vessel to be immediately crippled by unseen [[anti-matter bomb]]s. Chedaki was killed in the blast, although Organa survived the crash to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] below.<ref name="marvel53" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chedaki first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]], written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1981]].<ref name="marvel53" />
